name: The Dreamer
title: Insomniac

abilities.name: Between Waking and Sleep
abilities.text: Enemy models may not cheat fate when targeting this model if it is within 2" of another ally.

abilities.name: Contagious Nightmare
abilities.text: When this model declares an action while within 2" of another model with a Fright token, this model receives a (-).

abilities.name: Just a Dream
abilities.text: After this model is dealt damage from an attack, it may drain two (soulstone). If it does, it may not be attacked for the remainder of the activation.

actions.name: Endless Slumber
actions.effects: Target gains either a Slow or Fright token. For each raise this action receives, the target discards a random card.

triggers.name: Realm of Nytemare
triggers.text: A friendly Lord Chompy Bits within 8" of the target may place into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Counting Sheep
triggers.text: Draw a card with a value of 1-5 from the top two cards of your discard pile.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: In a Trance
actions.effects: Place the target within 4" of its current location.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Roused
triggers.text: Kill the target. Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target before removing it.

actions.name: Manifest Nightmare
actions.effects: Summon a Nightmare model that this model has not summoned this turn within range. The summoned model gains a Flicker token.

triggers.name: Idle Thoughts
triggers.text: Summon a Daydream with a Flicker token within 2" of this model.

extraction_notes: In a Trance has Skill 0(m) which is slightly unusual but clearly marked on the card
The asterisk (*) in the TN column for Manifest Nightmare appears to be present - this may indicate a special condition but is recorded as null per the visible dash in context
